vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm mở hộp sản phẩm
vocab.example: High-end footwear brands often invest heavily in the unboxing experience to make their online customers feel valued.

vocab.meaning: thử đồ ảo (sử dụng công nghệ AR)
vocab.example: With the advent of virtual try-on technology, the risk of buying shoes that don't suit my style has been significantly mitigated.
The proliferation of counterfeit goods on certain e-commerce sites makes me very cautious about where I purchase luxury sneakers.

vocab.meaning: độ êm ái và sự nâng đỡ (của giày)
vocab.example: It's difficult to gauge the actual level of cushioning and support just by looking at a high-resolution image online.
The sheer convenience of doorstep delivery is the primary reason I’ve shifted away from traditional shopping malls.

vocab.meaning: nội dung do người dùng tạo ra (hình ảnh, video thực tế)
vocab.example: I rely heavily on user-generated content, like real-life photos in the reviews, to see how the shoes look in natural light.
I managed to snag a pair of designer heels at half price during a midnight flash sale last week.

vocab.meaning: bị phồng rộp chân (do giày không vừa/cứng)
vocab.example: My biggest fear with online shoe shopping is that the material will be too stiff, causing my feet to erupt in blisters after the first wear.
I always ensure that the website uses a secure payment gateway before entering my credit card credentials.

vocab.meaning: đảm bảo/xác nhận cho chất lượng
vocab.example: I only buy from reputable online retailers because I know I can trust them to vouch for the quality of their products.
